case_title: REBECCA FALL VS. SCOTT F KAUFFMAN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FALL, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFFMAN, SCOTT F JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FALL, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAUFFMAN, SCOTT F $5,725.00 PRINCIPAL, $248.75 INTEREST, $292.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,266.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT FILED BY PETITIONER FALL, REBECCA
